tvShow.name: Ransom Canyon
tvShow.overview: Passions run deep in a small Texas town, as three ranching dynasties fight for their land, their legacies and the people they love.

episodes.name: Don't Let Me Fall
episodes.overview: Reeling from loss, Staten fails to notice Quinn's growing feelings — while Davis sees an opening. The arrival of a mysterious drifter shakes up the town.

episodes.name: Sure as the Day Is Long
episodes.overview: Staten follows a key lead in his investigation. Quinn makes a deal with troubling implications. Lucas struggles to keep his brother in line.

episodes.name: Trouble Can Be Fun Sometimes
episodes.overview: Conflict ignites at the dance hall's grand reopening. A familiar face from Yancy's past makes an unwelcome appearance.

episodes.name: That Boy Is My Whole Heart
episodes.overview: A feud with his father gives Reid a chance to bond with Staten — even if it means working side-by-side with Lucas. Davis attempts to win over Quinn.

episodes.name: I Love a Good Secret
episodes.overview: Davis' growing bond with Quinn is threatened by his ex-wife, who has a devious plan to take down Staten and Cap. Yancy takes a risk at the rodeo.

episodes.name: We Need to Talk About Reid
episodes.overview: Paula Jo sows discord between Staten and Quinn. Ellie digs into Yancy's past. Lucas and Lauren make a shocking discovery.

episodes.name: By the Grace of God
episodes.overview: Staten and Quinn find themselves in close quarters when a tornado strikes. A confession sparks new revelations in the investigation into Randall's death.

episodes.name: The Bad Seed
episodes.overview: Despite a break in the case, Dan still has doubts. Ellie pressures Yancy to come clean to Cap. Lauren prepares for her big cheer tryout.

episodes.name: About Forever
episodes.overview: Torn between her passions, Quinn must make a choice. Staten and Davis' tenuous alliance is threatened. Cap comes face-to-face with his past regrets.

episodes.name: Maybe It's Time Yancy Grey Dies Too
episodes.overview: Tensions between Staten and Davis come to a head. Ellie uncovers a bombshell. Dan must decide whether to reveal the truth — at enormous cost.

episodes.name: Hey There, Cowboy
episodes.overview: Quinn returns home to find her mother is in town. Tensions mount between Staten and his father at the ranch. Yancy grows impatient with his housemate.

episodes.name: Edge of My Seat Here, Quinn
episodes.overview: A sudden power shift at the Double K ranch ignites a bitter feud. Quinn shows her suitor around the town — and dreams up an ambitious plan to revive it.

episodes.name: That Dog Won't Hunt
episodes.overview: A high-stakes scheme kicks off at the homecoming football game. Staten offers to help Quinn reach out to an old rival for her new musical venture.

episodes.name: Forever and Always
episodes.overview: Past betrayals and buried feelings make for a revelatory dinner at the O'Grady household. Kit spoils the ending of Lucas and Lauren's cozy movie night.

episodes.name: That Leaves Two
episodes.overview: Staten hits the trail with an ulterior motive. As Quinn prepares for the festival, Oliver helps her reconnect with the town through a forgotten landmark.

episodes.name: Can't Never Could
episodes.overview: Complications during a road trip force Quinn and Staten into close quarters. Yancy, Sidney and Ellie's plan commences — and quickly goes off the rails.

episodes.name: No Place Like Home
episodes.overview: As festival fever sweeps through Ransom Canyon, a series of setbacks threaten everything Quinn and her team have poured their hearts and souls into.

episodes.name: Love Is a Canyon
episodes.overview: While the future of the Double K ranch hangs in the balance, Staten and Quinn ponder the meaning of home as love and loss sweep through the town.
